targets.rpoBasis: Gate A pilot target: restore from the most recent daily logical backup artifact. RIVT does not process escrow, payroll, or platform-held job payments in Gate A.
targets.rtoBasis: Gate A pilot target: restore application service and managed PostgreSQL/object-storage-backed records within 4 hours using the documented logical backup artifact restore path.
